name: Vistance Networks, Inc.
business: Vistance Networks provides infrastructure solutions for communication, data center, and entertainment networks, including digital video and IP television distribution systems and broadband access platforms. The company sells to service providers (cable, telephone, satellite operators) and enterprises, with a focus on enabling wired and wireless connectivity. Their segments are RUCKUS (enterprise wireless networks) and Aurora (broadband and video infrastructure).
sellsTo: cable television providers or multi-system operators (MSOs)

exposures.sentence: We are a global provider of infrastructure solutions that enable service providers, including cable, telephone and digital broadcast satellite operators and media programmers, to deliver media, voice, Internet Protocol (IP) data services and Wi-Fi to their subscribers and allow enterprises to experience constant wireless and wired connectivity across complex and varied networking environments.

Our customers include substantially all the leading global telecommunications operators, data center managers, cable television providers or multi-system operators (MSOs) and thousands of enterprise customers, including many Fortune 500 companies.

Product offerings include indoor cellular solutions such as indoor and outdoor Wi-Fi and long-term evolution (LTE) access points, access and aggregation switches; an Internet of Things (IoT) suite, on-premises and cloud-based control and management systems; and software and software-as-a-service applications addressing security, location, reporting and analytics.
To support the increased demands of a growing game-playing subscriber base, all operators are continuing to seek new ways to reduce the latency and jitter of the gaming packet streams.

catalysts.event: Distribution of funds under BEAD Program
catalysts.sentence: While we saw minimal investment under the BEAD Program in 2024, we expect more funds to be distributed in the second half of 2025.
We expect a majority of our backlog as of December 31, 2025 to be recognized as revenue during 2026.
We expect to make cash payments of $4.6 million in 2026 and $0.3 million during 2027 to settle our transformation restructuring actions.
